business_ideas.idea: Girl Boss: media company with 2M social followers and 250k newsletter subscribers, now operated as bootstrap business.
Braintrust: decentralized Upwork alternative using blockchain tokens to align creator incentives.
Angel syndicate investing: using AngelList to syndicate small checks ($10-25k) into high-potential startups.

predictions.text: Best investments come from intersection of personal curiosity, good network access, and strong fundamentals.
